stemHtml: A shining light is fading out (i.e. when flying into fog, dust or haze). What kind of illusion could the pilot get?

options.a: The source of light stands still.
options.b: The source of light is approaching him/her with increasing speed.
options.c: The source of light moves away from him/her.
options.d: The light source will make the pilot believe that he/she is climbing.
